overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a vibrant futuristic cyberpunk city. The player moves along a waterfront promenade lined with orange safety railings, passing through tree-shaded areas and narrow commercial alleys with neon signage and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with orange safety railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beside the canal

notable_agents.action: large man in vest walking toward the camera
woman in coat walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: bright orange metal railing running along the right side of the walkway
tall cylindrical tower covered in digital advertisements and neon displays
large glowing advertisement screens on the tower and surrounding buildings
tropical palm trees planted along the left side of the walkway
orange and gray public seating benches along the left side
water channel running parallel to the walkway on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunlit waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward along a paved walkway bordered by orange safety railings on the right and palm trees with benches on the left. A massive skyscraper tower covered in digital billboards dominates the distant center view, while various pedestrians walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-shaded pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the tower through the tree canopy, then returns to level
entering deeper shade under large trees with purple neon lights becoming visible on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded area and glancing up at the tower through the trees

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench conversing in the shade

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees providing dense shade over the walkway
tall digital sign displaying 'PINAL WATER' advertisement
glowing purple hexagonal light panels on building facades
covered seating area with people resting under white canopies

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a tree-shaded pedestrian area where the camera briefly tilts up to view the tower through the canopy. Large shade trees dominate the left side while purple neon lights and digital advertising posters appear on the buildings. Pedestrians are seen sitting on benches rather than walking, and the lighting becomes a mix of sunlight and shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with vending machines and debris

events.description: passing by scattered debris and abandoned items littering the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow commercial corridor past vending machines

entered.detail: low-rise orange structure with shop fronts and digital signage
bright purple automated kiosks with yellow warning symbols
red and white striped barriers blocking off part of the walkway
scattered trash and abandoned objects on the ground
overhead pedestrian bridge crossing above the alley ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow commercial alleyway lined with an orange building on the left and purple vending machines on the right. The sky is mostly blocked by surrounding structures, creating an artificial lighting environment. Debris and litter are scattered across the paved ground, and construction barriers partially block the left side of the path as the camera continues toward an elevated walkway in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit commercial alley. It begins on a sunlit paved walkway bordered by orange safety railings and palm trees, moving toward a massive skyscraper tower draped in digital billboards. As the camera enters a tree-shaded pedestrian area, the lighting shifts into a mix of sunlight and shadow, with the view of the tower flickering through the canopy amidst purple neon lights and digital posters. The scene then narrows into a commercial alleyway where the sky is blocked by surrounding structures, shifting the environment to artificial lighting. Finally, the camera glides past purple vending machines and scattered debris, moving through construction barriers toward an elevated walkway in the distance.
